content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s single-threaded iterative refinement pipeline as a primitive single-perspective self-reflection mechanism, and upgrade it by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection research to create a multi-perspective self-refine framework. This framework retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, while resolving the common blind spot that single-perspective feedback cannot catch.
